title: xeranthemum fragrans
intro: Xeranthemum fragrans, also known as the sweet scabious, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Xeranthemum fragrans is often used in topical creams, ointments, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various skin-related issues.
